✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧

[Series: Maja wolrd]

Wolrdbuilding: Years might be a centurie have passed since the events of Gate of Genesis is open at unknown places. People have gotten used to the presence of call Maja Energy in their lives and have learned to use it to their advantage, both in war and in their day-to-day lives. Unfortunately, this positive attitude is not shared by everyone....The world is split into three factions, each ruling their continents. Powerful Myriad is preparing for an attack on the Dynasty's lands in order to put an end to what they see as the "Maja Threat". On the other hand, the people of the Dynasty believe that, with the correct use, this power will help humanity solve a lot of problems. A third faction has emerged from the shadows in the background of these events, the mysterious Harbinger. These warriors in black clothes know about the nature of Maja Energy a lot more than others, which frightens both the Dynasty and the Myriad... Amidst this turmoil, waiting new hero has appeared, their past surrounded in mystery and their future unwritten. Destined to discover the mysteries of the factions, they will bring the war to an end and save the world. It is up to fate decide what kind of path they will walk. But please just know in this world no factions are good one or bad one just they just see different perspective

✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧
